title: The Legend of the Four Hundred Rabbits
description: The 400 rabbit gods of drunkenness — the Aztec myth explaining the many forms of intoxication.
introduction: The 400 rabbit gods of drunkenness — the Aztec myth explaining the many forms of intoxication.

translation.text: The 400 rabbits are the gods of pulque. Each represents a different kind of drunkenness.
